source: baseline-referenced BCM, normalized form; ESC D50=1.7 (Baldinger/Klein PET), FLV D50=50 (Takano)
_framing_note: CANONICAL normalized plasticity: tau_G*dG/dt = alpha*phi_e*(phid1-phih)(phid1-thetaM)(phisat-phid1) - (1 + b(eC-eC_h))*G. tau_G=12 wk PINNED (approx trial duration; weakly id. [8,15]). Constitutive decay normalized to 1 (rate 1/tau_G). Drug = fractional modification b(eC-eC_h)~0.08 clinically. NO kappa_h. Fit (2026-07-14 clean-form recalibration): b=0.0268 nM^-1, kappa_des=0.108, RMS 0.828. b,kappa_des sloppy/correlated, outputs stiff.
